name: ai-seo
description: Optimize content to get cited by AI search engines — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, Gemini, Copilot. Use when you want your content to appear in AI-generated answers, not just ranked in blue links. Triggers: 'optimize for AI search', 'get cited by ChatGPT', 'AI Overviews', 'Perplexity citations', 'AI SEO', 'generative search', 'LLM visibility', 'GEO' (generative engine optimization). NOT for traditional SEO ranking (use seo-audit). NOT for content creation (use content-product
author: alirezarezvani
summary_zh: 优化内容让ChatGPT等AI搜索引擎直接引用的工具，解决内容只有传统搜索排名却进不了AI回答的问题，适合想提升AI问答曝光的场景。
